Give strong drink to him who is ready to perish;
and wine to the bitter in soul:
summary: In desperate situations, offering strong drink may provide temporary relief to those suffering deeply.

text:
Let him drink, and forget his poverty,
and remember his misery no more.
summary: Using drink to forget poverty and misery offers temporary relief but is not a lasting solution.

text:
Open your mouth for the mute,
in the cause of all who are left desolate.
summary: Speak up for those who cannot speak for themselves and defend the rights of the vulnerable.

text:
Open your mouth, judge righteously,
and serve justice to the poor and needy.”
summary: Speak up fairly and ensure justice for those who are poor and in need.

text:
Who can find a worthy woman?
For her price is far above rubies.
summary: A virtuous and valuable partner is rare and priceless, worth more than any material wealth.

text:
The heart of her husband trusts in her.
He shall have no lack of gain.
summary: A trustworthy partner brings security and prosperity to the relationship.

text:
She does him good, and not harm,
all the days of her life.
summary: A faithful partner consistently brings good and not harm throughout their life together.

text:
She seeks wool and flax,
and works eagerly with her hands.
summary: She actively pursues resources and works hard with her hands.

text:
She is like the merchant ships.
She brings her bread from afar.
summary: A diligent person goes to great lengths to provide for their household, even sourcing resources from far away.

text:
She rises also while it is yet night,
gives food to her household,
and portions for her servant girls.
summary: A diligent person starts early to provide for their household and those they care for.

text:
She considers a field, and buys it.
With the fruit of her hands, she plants a vineyard.
summary: A wise person plans carefully and works hard to create and grow valuable resources.

text:
She arms her waist with strength,
and makes her arms strong.
summary: She prepares herself with strength and works hard to be capable and resilient.

text:
She perceives that her merchandise is profitable.
Her lamp doesn’t go out by night.
summary: A wise person recognizes the value of their work and remains diligent and prepared even during late hours.

text:
She lays her hands to the distaff,
and her hands hold the spindle.
summary: She works skillfully and diligently with her hands, demonstrating industriousness.

text:
She opens her arms to the poor;
yes, she extends her hands to the needy.
summary: A truly virtuous person shows compassion by generously helping those in need.

text:
She is not afraid of the snow for her household;
for all her household are clothed with scarlet.
summary: A diligent and prepared person ensures their family is well cared for and protected against hardships.

text:
She makes for herself carpets of tapestry.
Her clothing is fine linen and purple.
summary: She works skillfully to provide beautiful and valuable things for herself.

text:
Her husband is respected in the gates,
when he sits among the elders of the land.
summary: A wife's character and support can enhance her husband's reputation and standing in the community.

text:
She makes linen garments and sells them,
and delivers sashes to the merchant.
summary: She works hard to create and sell quality products, showing industriousness and business sense.

text:
Strength and dignity are her clothing.
She laughs at the time to come.
summary: A person of strength and dignity faces the future with confidence and without fear.

text:
She opens her mouth with wisdom.
Faithful instruction is on her tongue.
summary: She speaks wisely and teaches faithfully, offering valuable guidance to others.

text:
She looks well to the ways of her household,
and doesn’t eat the bread of idleness.
summary: She carefully manages her household and avoids laziness.

text:
Her children rise up and call her blessed.
Her husband also praises her:
summary: A virtuous person's family honors and appreciates her for her goodness and strength.

text:
“Many women do noble things,
but you excel them all.”
summary: Among many admirable people, one person can stand out as truly exceptional.

text:
Charm is deceitful, and beauty is vain;
but a woman who fears Yahweh, she shall be praised.
summary: True value lies not in outward charm or beauty, but in reverence and respect for God.

text:
Give her of the fruit of her hands!
Let her works praise her in the gates!
summary: Honor and reward a person's hard work and let their achievements speak for themselves.
